pages.text: $(bold)Mega Spruce Seed$()$(br2)The giant taiga spruce. Its seed falls only from the 2x2 megaflora.
pages.title: Mega Spruce Seed

pages.text: $(bold)Grows:$() plant in a 2×2 to raise a giant spruce.$(br2)$(bold)No conversion recipe$() — this seed falls only from a fully-grown mega spruce.
pages.title: Planting & Catalyst
